content: rent, philosopher, child personas. • Socratic dialog mid-game to prompt reflection. • Cinematic post-game replay with camera swoops and narrated analysis. --- 10. Family &amp Social Engagement Lack of persistence and narrative continuity reduces long-term appeal. Expansion Proposals • Themed player profiles with stats and unlockable archetypes (Strategist, Trickster, Guardian). • Family Chronicle: narrative game log across eras. • Legacy Mode: world map campaign tracking family conquests. • Story Seeds: auto-generated match narratives. • Asynchronous Multiplayer: time-stamped moves, era commentary, in-app chat. --- 11. System Architecture &amp Modular Scene Engine Monolithic scenes hinder scalability; adopt a modular approach. Modular Scene Engine • Each theme as a self-contained package:• `scene.json` (layout) • `assets/` (models, textures, audio) • `ruleset.js` (logic) • `lore.md` (content) • Community toolkit for authoring and sharing themes. AI Middleware • Lightweight inference combining game state, historical context, and player archetype. Continuous Integration • Automated asset validation and pipeline for importing new 3D models and audio. --- 12. Mythic &amp Philosophical
